However, this is standard behavior for assertion functions, and passing untrusted messages is common in debugging or validation scenarios. It does not constitute malicious behavior.\n\n- **Potential vulnerabilities:** No claims or assumptions about vulnerabilities are made beyond the standard pattern.\n\n### Critical evaluation:\n\n- **Are the reported issues present?**  \n  Yes.
